semantic.role: Configuration module defining types, constants, and a dynamic builder function for document language selection in a multilingual documentation system.
responsibilities: Defines the DocumentLanguageChoice interface with fields for title, value, selected, and disabled.
Exports a constant HIGH_CAPACITY_LANGUAGE_SEPARATOR_VALUE for UI separation of high-capacity languages.
Exports a display string HIGH_CAPACITY_LANGUAGE_SEPARATOR labeling the high-capacity language tier.
Exports an empty DOCUMENT_LANGUAGE_QUALITY_NOTE (placeholder for future guidance).

Exports the function getDocumentLanguageChoices that builds and returns an ordered list of DocumentLanguageChoice objects based on default and high-capacity language values, honoring a provided array of selected languages.
outOfScope: Persistence or retrieval of language preferences from storage.
CLI command handling or argument parsing.
invariants: The order of language choices must be: default languages first, then the high-capacity separator, then high-capacity languages.
The separator constant value is fixed to '__separator_high_capacity_languages__'.
The separator label text is fixed and must not be translated or altered.
The DOCUMENT_LANGUAGE_QUALITY_NOTE is currently an empty string (may be populated later).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a centralized, consistent source of language selection options for all documentation UI tiers, separating standard languages from those requiring stronger multilingual models.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Added a dynamic builder function (getDocumentLanguageChoices) to generate language choice lists with selection state, replacing static constant lists.

semantic.driftReason: Previous semantic contract only covered interfaces and constants; the addition of the function getDocumentLanguageChoices expands the module's role from pure configuration to a dynamic choice builder.

English.role: Configuration module defining types, constants, and a dynamic builder function for document language selection in a multilingual documentation system.
responsibilities: Defines the DocumentLanguageChoice interface with fields for title, value, selected, and disabled.
Exports a constant HIGH_CAPACITY_LANGUAGE_SEPARATOR_VALUE for UI separation of high-capacity languages.
Exports a display string HIGH_CAPACITY_LANGUAGE_SEPARATOR labeling the high-capacity language tier.
Exports an empty DOCUMENT_LANGUAGE_QUALITY_NOTE (placeholder for future guidance).

Exports the function getDocumentLanguageChoices that builds and returns an ordered list of DocumentLanguageChoice objects based on default and high-capacity language values, honoring a provided array of selected languages.
outOfScope: Persistence or retrieval of language preferences from storage.
CLI command handling or argument parsing.

Simplified Chinese.role: 定义文档语言选择模块，提供类型、常量和动态构建器，用于多语言文档系统中的语言选项生成。
responsibilities: 定义 DocumentLanguageChoice 接口，包含 title、value、selected 和 disabled 字段。
导出常量 HIGH_CAPACITY_LANGUAGE_SEPARATOR_VALUE，用于 UI 中分隔高容量语言。
导出显示字符串 HIGH_CAPACITY_LANGUAGE_SEPARATOR，标记高容量语言层级。
导出一个空的 DOCUMENT_LANGUAGE_QUALITY_NOTE（供未来使用）。
导出函数 getDocumentLanguageChoices，根据默认语言和高容量语言值生成有序的 DocumentLanguageChoice 对象列表，并处理选定状态。
outOfScope: 语言偏好数据的持久化或读取。
LLM 或 AI 模型调用。
CLI 命令处理或参数解析。
